author: Fable 5 (post-epic visual quality remediation)
trigger: User acceptance flagged: bald characters, rough look, stiff walk

rootCauses.baldness: hair_06 curl cap geometry sat almost entirely INSIDE the toy head (undershell radii [0.35,0.24,0.32] vs head radii [0.3745,0.4115,0.3662]); Quaternius hair_01..05 fit via hand-tuned transforms left buzzed styles skin-tight and long/parted styles mis-shaped; the old oracle accepted 15% exterior vertices with no front-hairline requirement
stiffWalk: no heading logic: characters kept their static seat rotation for the entire walk (sideways/backwards gliding)
45% foot slide: walk clip stance-foot ground speed measured 1.045 world-units/s vs 1.9 units/s translation
rootCauses.roughness: eye-only faces (no mouth), close-set small eyes

fixes.hair: all six hair assets are now Offisim-authored procedural toy styles built for the exact toy head (short crop, long drape, ponytail, curly afro, helmet bob, spiky crop); runtime hairTransforms are identity; curly maps to the new afro (hair_04), spiky to hair_06
fixes.walkHeading: EmployeeUnit frame-drives the character wrapper Y rotation: faces the route direction while walking (shortest-arc smoothing, CHARACTER_TURN_RATE_PER_SECOND=10), settles back to seat facing on arrival; reduced motion snaps
fixes.strideSync: locomotion clips (walk/walk.formal/carry) play at CHARACTER_WALK_ANIMATION_TIME_SCALE=1.82 (measured: 1.9 / 1.045), other clips keep role tempo
fixes.faces: per-expression mouth decals (neutral small smile / happy wide smile / worried frown / focus flat line) in the same decal material; eyes enlarged 0.042->0.05 and spread to +/-0.145
fixes.oracle: harness-character-toy-p1 hair-fit check strengthened: >=50% exterior vertices, eye-band z ceiling made y-aware, and a mandatory visible front-hairline vertex band (the exact regression class that shipped bald characters)

gates.checkDeadcode: clean (sharp devDependency removed with the hair texture path)

observed: all eight roster characters show visible hair from the default office camera; zero unintended bald heads
Personnel > Appearance > Curly renders a full afro with front hairline, eyes, and smile (previously a buried black patch)
drag Alex Chen rest-area -> library -> back: sit.exit, route walk facing the travel direction, smooth arrival turn, sit.enter; ambient walkers (Jamie R., Zara O.) also face their routes
appearance change was reset (not saved) and the app quit cleanly
liveVerification.boundary: stride-sync verified by measurement + burst screenshots; no continuous video capture was retained in this pass
